idea-plugin.name: DeepSeek for PyCharm
idea-plugin.description:
DeepSeek for PyCharm

Bring DeepSeek AI directly into your PyCharm IDE. No API key required 鈥?the plugin embeds a browser panel that loads the official DeepSeek web interface. Simply log in once and start chatting.

Features

  • Embedded DeepSeek chat panel in the IDE tool window
  • Send selected code to DeepSeek via right-click context menu
  • Automatic light/dark theme sync (follows PyCharm theme)

Usage

  1. Open View 鈫?Tool Windows 鈫?DeepSeek
  2. Log in to your DeepSeek account in the embedded browser
  3. Select code in the editor, right-click, and choose Send to DeepSeek
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
Initial release:
  • Embedded DeepSeek web interface in a tool window
  • Send selected code to DeepSeek via context menu
  • Automatic theme synchronization

action.description: Send selected code to DeepSeek chat
